creator: rkoberman@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 182134
Patch to multimedia/mpb/Makefile to remove obsolete XINERAMA opt

The latest release of multimedia/mpv (mpv-0.25.0) no longer supports the --disable-xinerama configure option. If XINERAMA is deselected, the 'make configure' pass fails. The attached patch removes the option and moved the XORG xinerama and xineramaproto USE items to X!!_USE.
